code: import React from'react';import'./Dashboard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Dashboard=()=>{const stats=[{title:'Total users',value:'24,589',change:'+12%',icon:'fa-users'},{title:'Total content',value:'1,808',change:'+5%',icon:'fa-book'},{title:'Online now',value:'1,245',change:'+3%',icon:'fa-eye'},{title:'New today',value:'89',change:'+8%',icon:'fa-user-plus'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-dashboard",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Admin Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Manage users, content, chapters, videos and settings from one place."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stats-grid",children:stats.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"stat-title",children:item.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-icon",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas ".concat(item.icon)})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"stat-value",children:item.value}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat-change positive",children:[item.change," this week"]})]},item.title))})]});};export default Dashboard;
